channel.title: Newsletters on Aamu.app blog
channel.description: Recent content in Newsletters on Aamu.app blog

item.title: Newsletters in Aamu.app: from subscribers to sending
item.description: Create newsletters, manage subscribers, design reusable templates, send test messages, publish issues, and automate the workflow through the Aamu API.

item.title: Building with the Aamu API: From Tasks to Docs and GraphQL
item.description: A practical guide to the Aamu API for newsletters, tasks, docs, meetings, files, forms, database automations, GraphQL rows, and activity timelines.
